MCQ: What is the main goal of a learner in machine learning?
Choices: a: To memorize the training data | b: To generalize from its experience | c: To ignore the training data | d: To overfit the model

MCQ: Which type of learning involves finding structures in unlabelled data?
Choices: a: Supervised learning | b: Unsupervised learning | c: Reinforcement learning | d: Semi-supervised learning

MCQ: What is the process of reducing the number of random variables under consideration?
Choices: a: Feature extraction | b: Feature elimination | c: Dimensionality reduction | d: Manifold learning

MCQ: In which type of learning are the training data labelled with the expected outputs?
Choices: a: Supervised learning | b: Unsupervised learning | c: Reinforcement learning | d: Semi-supervised learning

MCQ: What is the goal of reinforcement learning?
Choices: a: To classify data | b: To find structures in unlabelled data | c: To maximise cumulative reward | d: To reduce dimensionality
